analysis.core_story_summary: As the name implies,this austerity clears all the obstacles faced by a man. It commences on the fourth day of the bright half of the hindu month-falgun and lasts for four months whereby a devotee observes fast on the fourth day(bright half) of every month that follows. One important characteristic of this austerity is the importance and use of sesame seeds in it's rituals.

audience_notes.children_8_12: Use simple language, explain divine names as characters in a sacred legend.
audience_notes.teens_13_17: Connect events to decision-making, identity, and consequences.
audience_notes.young_adults_18_30: Highlight ethics, leadership, and social relevance.
audience_notes.devotional_traditional: Preserve sacred framing and theological terms respectfully.
audience_notes.global_general: Keep cultural context brief and avoid insider assumptions.

sensitivity_notes: Mostly suitable for broad audiences with light cultural context.

redesigned_story_by_demographic.children_8_12: **Avighna-Vrata — Kids (8-12):** As the name implies,this austerity clears all the obstacles faced by a man. It commences on the fourth day of the bright half of the hindu month-falgun and lasts for four months whereby a devotee observes fast on the fourth day(bright half) of every month that follows. One important characteristic of this austerity is the importance and use of sesame seeds in it's rituals. This story teaches actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Think of it like a legend that helps us choose kindness, courage, and respect.
redesigned_story_by_demographic.teens_13_17: **Avighna-Vrata — Teens (13-17):** As the name implies,this austerity clears all the obstacles faced by a man. It commences on the fourth day of the bright half of the hindu month-falgun and lasts for four months whereby a devotee observes fast on the fourth day(bright half) of every month that follows. One important characteristic of this austerity is the importance and use of sesame seeds in it's rituals. For teens, the key idea is actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. It shows how choices, discipline, and character shape outcomes.

The narrative can be read as a reflection on purpose, responsibility, and values-driven action.
redesigned_story_by_demographic.devotional_traditional: **Avighna-Vrata — Devotional/Traditional Readers:** As the name implies,this austerity clears all the obstacles faced by a man. It commences on the fourth day of the bright half of the hindu month-falgun and lasts for four months whereby a devotee observes fast on the fourth day(bright half) of every month that follows. One important characteristic of this austerity is the importance and use of sesame seeds in it's rituals. The episode highlights actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. redesigned_story_by_demographic.global_general: **Avighna-Vrata — Global General Audience:** As the name implies,this austerity clears all the obstacles faced by a man. It commences on the fourth day of the bright half of the hindu month-falgun and lasts for four months whereby a devotee observes fast on the fourth day(bright half) of every month that follows. One important characteristic of this austerity is the importance and use of sesame seeds in it's rituals. In universal terms, it explores actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Cultural names are preserved while the message is presented in accessible contemporary English.
